messages.content: They should do an IQ test and only then allow them to play the game provided they have an iq above 100
I was playing with my friends yesterday and my own teammates made me wanna kms

That's why I quit already lol (tbh it's been more than 1.5 yrs now for me).. 
Honestly it was my fav shooting game ngl, i only liked it compared to other competitors

I even bought many skins too lol, hmm maybe not much, but yeaa around 12k i spent on it before 😭 only bcoz i liked it, but yeaa players here ruined it really hard...

Saying as a peak plat player, i was kinda stuck in the bronze lobby for too Long... Yk why ig
It was my first and last shooting game ig, will be back thou when replay is there or maybe mobile version hehe : )
i have started playing it again
